name: Broccoli Crevette Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Vegetable oil or olive oil
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, sauté the following ingredients for 5 to 10 minutes: vegetable oil or olive oil, butter, cooked and peeled popcorn, shrimp, chopped sea clams, garlic.
2. Add clam base and bring to boil slowly.
3. Gradually add all-purpose flour and stir until smooth, cooking about 5 minutes over medium heat.
4. Incorporate ground broccoli stock and florets, whole milk, heavy whipping cream, dry dill, dry basil, lemon juice, and ground white pepper (or to taste). Simmer for a few more minutes until combined.
